questions.question: What U.S. state is the seventh largest economic power in the world?
What movie offers the line: 'I was a better man with you, as a woman, than I was with a woman as a man'?
What outfit did Charles Lindbergh donate the Spirit of St. Louis to?
What surgeon got the idea to use carbolic acid as a disinfectant when he learned of its success as a deodorant of raw sewage?
What NBA expansion team lost an NBA record 23 straight games in 1996?
What name did a semipro football team in Springfield, Missouri drop, after gripes from mental-health workers in 1998?
